title: Optimize DynamoDB query pattern in auto-issues service
summary: auto-issues.ts uses Query on partition key only. Could optimize with Scan using begins_with filter for batch avatar lookups to reduce full-table scans.
acceptance: Implement Scan with begins_with filter for batch lookups
Performance benchmarks show improved query time
Documentation updated with pattern choice rationale
impact: Medium - query performance improvement for auto-issues
notes: Trade-off: Scan can be more efficient for begins_with patterns on large tables with sparse data.
